title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarked mixed-provider code generation workflows using Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 in different role assignments. He ran the same four workflow configurations against three GitHub issues and had Opus evaluate each output across seven dimensions including correctness, code quality, and plan-to-implementation fidelity.
